utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: Monica , why have you brought me here of all places ? !

emotion_cause.span: 1_why have you brought me here of all places ? !

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: I tell you , this wedding is not going to happen .

emotion_cause.span: 3_this wedding is not going to happen .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Okay ? But ... but imagine a lot more lights , okay ? And ... and you know fewer bricks , and ... and ... and flowers , and candles

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: And the musicians , look , they can go over here , okay ? And the chairs can face this way , and ... You go .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: But ... but , if you do not love this , we will do it in any other place at any other time .

utterances.text: Really , it is fine , whatever you want .
